mncFormats.Description: Plugin of inserting in the drawing formats according to GOST 2.301-68/ISO 216
mncFormats.FullDescription: Formats are inserted in the form of a block with a special label in the extended data. A label in the extended data is required to define the formats with other plugins (for example, "Sheet Numbering"). Therefore, you should not insert the formats with standard means of inserting a block into nanoCAD. Plugin allows you to add title blocks to the format – for this you need to install and at least once started the plugin "Title blocks"
mncFormats.h30: Specify a dwg file as a logo
mncFormats.h32: Edit the list of user posts
mncFormats.h38: Length of the format (mm) x Height of the format (mm)
mncFormats.h47: If you uncheck the box, the scale of the format will correspond to the scale indicated in the main window of the plugin
mncFormats.h56: The sizes of formats at multiplicity more than 1 are taken by multiplication of the parties of a format with multiplicity 1 on size of multiplicity that corresponds to limiting deviations in table 3 (paragraph 6). When you check the box, the sizes of the formats will be taken in full accordance with table 2 (paragraph 5)
mncFormats.h85: Copy layout name to title block
mncFormats.h88: Copy layout name to selected cell
mncFormats.err1: The configuration file is corrupt!\nRun the ModPlus Configurator
mncFormats.err3: Invalid characters in the layout name:
mncFormats.err4: The following characters are not allowed:
mncFormats.err5: No file with title blocks was found!\nRun the "Title blocks" plugin to unpack a dwg file with title blocks
mncFormats.err6: Length of the format is not entered
mncFormats.err7: Height of the format is not entered
mncFormats.err8: Length of the format must be at least 30 mm
mncFormats.err9: Height of the format should be not less than 15 mm
mncFormats.err10: A title block with a table style was not found in the title block file
mncFormats.err11: Run the "Title blocks" plugin to overwrite the title blocks file
mncFormats.err12: The title block does not correspond to the title block ModPlus! Invalid number of cells
mncFormats.err13: The file was created in a later version of nanoCAD!
mncFormats.msg2: already contained in the list of standard values
mncFormats.msg3: The list contains the same values!
mncFormats.msg4: Available with the full version of the "Title blocks" plugin
mncFormats.msg5: You can not add more than
mncFormats.msg12: Empty sheet name is not allowed!
